Question: Continuing with Example 8.12, show that when the battery is connected across the plates the energy stored in dielectric-filled capacitor is $$U = \kappa U_{0}$$ (larger than the energy $$U_{0}$$ of an empty capacitor kept at the same voltage). Compare this result with the result $$U = U_{0} \text{/} \kappa$$ found previously for an isolated, charged capacitor.
Repeat the calculations of Example 8.10 for the case in which the battery remains connected while the dielectric is placed in the capacitor.
